question_text: When working on a school project, you prefer to...
option_a: Research facts and data to build a strong foundation
option_b: Brainstorm creative ideas and explore wild possibilities

question_text: On a weekend, you would rather...
option_a: Build or fix something with your hands
option_b: Go on an unplanned adventure to a new place

question_text: In a group activity, you naturally...
option_a: Take charge and organize everyone
option_b: Focus deeply on your own part and make it excellent

question_text: If you got Rs 10,000 as a gift, you would...
option_a: Invest it or start a small side hustle
option_b: Save it carefully for something important later

question_text: When solving a problem, you trust...
option_a: Your instinct about what people need and feel
option_b: A systematic process and clear framework

question_text: You enjoy classes more when they involve...
option_a: Logical puzzles, math problems, or structured analysis
option_b: Drawing, storytelling, music, or open-ended projects

question_text: When you imagine your future career, you see yourself...
option_a: Creating something new that didn't exist before
option_b: Discovering and understanding how things already work

question_text: At a school fest, you would rather...
option_a: Be the event head managing everything
option_b: Be the star performer or subject expert on stage

question_text: When faced with a risky opportunity, you...
option_a: Jump in — high risk means high reward
option_b: Pause, plan, and proceed carefully

question_text: You would rather help a friend by...
option_a: Listening and giving emotional support
option_b: Making a step-by-step plan to fix their problem

question_text: When you read the news, you are drawn to...
option_a: Scientific breakthroughs and technology updates
option_b: Stories about art, culture, and human experiences

question_text: Your ideal summer project would be...
option_a: Building a robot, app, or gadget from scratch
option_b: Travelling to 5 new cities and documenting the journey

question_text: When there is a class debate, you prefer to...
option_a: Moderate the debate and keep things fair
option_b: Argue passionately for your side with deep research

question_text: You find it more exciting to...
option_a: Start your own YouTube channel or business
option_b: Get a stable, high-paying job at a top company

question_text: When making a big decision, you rely more on...
option_a: How you and others feel about it
option_b: Pros-and-cons lists and logical analysis

question_text: You would rather be known as someone who...
option_a: Thinks deeply and finds precise answers
option_b: Thinks differently and comes up with surprising ideas

question_text: If you could master one skill instantly, it would be...
option_a: Carpentry, coding, or engineering — making things
option_b: Photography, travel writing, or anthropology — understanding the world

question_text: Your dream team role would be...
option_a: The captain who sets the strategy and motivates the team
option_b: The MVP whose individual brilliance wins the game

question_text: You admire people who...
option_a: Built something from nothing — like startup founders
option_b: Dedicated their life to mastering a craft — like scientists or artists

question_text: When there is a conflict between friends, you...
option_a: Mediate and try to understand both sides emotionally
option_b: Analyze the situation objectively and suggest a fair solution
